schemes.benefit_en: Rs 15,000 in 6 installments for girl child education & welfare
schemes.benefit_hi: बालिका शिक्षा व कल्याण हेतु 6 किस्तों में ₹15,000

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 5 lakh compensation for farmer accidental death/disability

schemes.benefit_en: 300 units free electricity per month for domestic consumers
schemes.benefit_hi: घरेलू उपभोक्ताओं को 300 यूनिट मुफ्त बिजली
schemes.eligibility: UP domestic electricity consumers

schemes.benefit_en: Financial & skill support for migrant laborers returning to UP
schemes.benefit_hi: वापस आए प्रवासी मजदूरों को आर्थिक व कौशल सहायता

schemes.benefit_en: Additional housing grant for urban slum dwellers not covered under PMAY
schemes.benefit_hi: PMAY से वंचित शहरी गरीबों को आवास सहायता
schemes.eligibility: Urban BPL families without own home in UP

schemes.benefit_hi: ऑनलाइन खसरा-खतौनी निःशुल्क देखें
schemes.eligibility: All UP landowners

schemes.name_en: Mahatma Jyotirao Phule Jan Arogya Yojana
schemes.name_hi: महात्मा ज्योतिराव फुले जन आरोग्य योजना
schemes.benefit_en: Health insurance up to Rs 1.5 lakh/year (Rs 2.5 lakh for special diseases)
schemes.benefit_hi: ₹1.5 लाख/वर्ष स्वास्थ्य बीमा (विशेष बीमारियों में ₹2.5 लाख)

schemes.benefit_en: 95% subsidy on solar agriculture pumps (3HP/5HP/7.5HP)
schemes.benefit_hi: सौर कृषि पंप पर 95% सब्सिडी
schemes.eligibility: Maharashtra farmers with electricity-deprived fields

schemes.benefit_en: State top-up of Rs 30,000-50,000 over PMAY for SC/ST/NT/OBC

schemes.name_en: Shetmal Taran Karj Yojana (Farm Loan Waiver)

schemes.eligibility: Farmers who store produce in NWRA-registered warehouses

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 1,500/month financial assistance for women aged 21-65
schemes.benefit_hi: 21-65 वर्ष की महिलाओं को ₹1,500/माह आर्थिक सहायता

schemes.name_en: Annasaheb Patil Arthik Magas Vikas Mahamandal Loan

schemes.benefit_en: Education loan up to Rs 4 lakh at 4% interest (1% for girls/disabled)

schemes.eligibility: Bihar students who passed Class 12, admitted to recognized institutions

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 50,000 for girl child from birth to graduation in 7 installments
schemes.benefit_hi: जन्म से स्नातक तक बालिका को 7 किस्तों में ₹50,000

schemes.benefit_en: Free electricity connection to all unelectrified households
schemes.benefit_hi: सभी बिना बिजली घरों को मुफ्त कनेक्शन

schemes.name_en: Indira Mahila Shakti Udyam Protsahan Yojana

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 8,000-10,000/month stipend while learning skills at companies

schemes.benefit_en: Housing for urban poor not covered under PMAY with state subsidy

schemes.benefit_en: Cashless health treatment up to Rs 5 lakh for serious diseases
schemes.benefit_hi: गंभीर बीमारियों के लिए ₹5 लाख तक कैशलेस इलाज

schemes.benefit_en: Daytime (5am-9pm) electricity supply to farmers for irrigation
schemes.benefit_hi: किसानों को सिंचाई के लिए दिन में बिजली (5AM-9PM)

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 5 lakh/year cashless health coverage for all WB families

schemes.benefit_en: Subsidized auto-rickshaw/taxi loans for unemployed youth
schemes.benefit_hi: बेरोजगार युवाओं को ऑटो/टैक्सी ऋण पर सब्सिडी

schemes.benefit_en: Affordable flats and houses for EWS/LIG groups in WB
schemes.benefit_hi: EWS/LIG समूह के लिए किफायती फ्लैट

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 1,000/month financial support for women-headed households

schemes.benefit_en: Safe tap water connection to every rural/urban household

schemes.benefit_en: Financial assistance up to Rs 2 lakh for cancer and major illness treatment
schemes.benefit_hi: कैंसर और गंभीर बीमारियों के इलाज में ₹2 लाख तक सहायता

schemes.benefit_en: Women SHG microfinance, skill training, enterprise support network

schemes.benefit_en: Incubation, seed fund up to Rs 10 lakh, mentoring for tech startups

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 5 lakh (women: Rs 10 lakh)/year free health cover for BPL families
schemes.benefit_hi: BPL परिवारों को ₹5 लाख (महिला: ₹10 लाख)/वर्ष मुफ्त इलाज

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 10,000/season financial assistance to small/marginal farmers

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 10,000/year (Rs 50,000 over 5 years) for Odisha women

schemes.benefit_hi: ओडिशा शहरी गरीबों को रोजगार गारंटी + कौशल प्रशिक्षण

schemes.benefit_en: Free coaching for competitive exams (UPSC, SSC, Banking) for Jharkhand youth

schemes.benefit_hi: जनजातीय/BPL परिवारों को गाय, बकरी, मुर्गी पर 50-90% सब्सिडी

schemes.benefit_en: Free 5kg wheat + 1kg rice per person per month

schemes.benefit_en: Free pilgrimage trip for senior citizens to religious sites
schemes.benefit_hi: बुजुर्गों को धार्मिक स्थलों की मुफ्त तीर्थ यात्रा
schemes.eligibility: Delhi residents aged 60+, annual income < Rs 1 lakh

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 2,100/month financial support for Delhi women
schemes.benefit_hi: दिल्ली महिलाओं को ₹2,100/माह सहायता
schemes.eligibility: Delhi women aged 18+, Delhi domicile, not income tax payer

schemes.benefit_en: Online job portal + skill centres + career guidance for Delhi youth
schemes.benefit_hi: दिल्ली युवाओं के लिए ऑनलाइन जॉब पोर्टल + स्किल सेंटर
schemes.eligibility: Delhi residents looking for employment

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 5,000-30,000 subsidy on electric 2-wheelers + scrapping incentive
schemes.benefit_hi: इलेक्ट्रिक दोपहिया पर ₹5,000-30,000 सब्सिडी
schemes.eligibility: Delhi residents buying FAME-approved EVs

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 5 lakh/year health insurance for families with income < Rs 1.8 lakh
schemes.benefit_hi: ₹1.8 लाख से कम आय वाले परिवारों को ₹5 लाख/वर्ष बीमा
schemes.eligibility: Haryana families with annual income < Rs 1.8 lakh

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 6,000/year benefit (pension/insurance/investment) per family
schemes.benefit_hi: परिवार को ₹6,000/वर्ष (पेंशन/बीमा/निवेश)
schemes.eligibility: Haryana families with income < Rs 1.8 lakh and land < 2 hectare

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 51,000 grant for marriage of BPL girl, Rs 71,000 for SC/ST
schemes.benefit_hi: BPL बेटी के विवाह पर ₹51,000, SC/ST को ₹71,000
schemes.eligibility: Haryana BPL/SC/ST families; girl aged 18+, boy aged 21+

schemes.benefit_en: 30% subsidy on solar water heaters for domestic use
schemes.benefit_hi: घरेलू उपयोग के सौर वाटर हीटर पर 30% सब्सिडी
schemes.eligibility: Haryana domestic consumers with electricity connection

schemes.benefit_en: Rice at Rs 1-2/kg to all CG ration card holders
schemes.benefit_hi: सभी राशन कार्ड धारकों को ₹1-2/किलो चावल
schemes.eligibility: All Chhattisgarh ration card holders

schemes.benefit_en: Govt buys cattle dung at Rs 2/kg, converted to compost/biogas
schemes.benefit_hi: सरकार गोबर ₹2/किलो खरीदती है; जैविक खाद/बायोगैस बनता है
schemes.eligibility: Chhattisgarh cattle owners (farmers, SHGs, gaushalas)

schemes.name_en: Rajiv Gandhi Gramin Bhumihin Krishi Mazdoor Nyay Yojana
schemes.name_hi: राजीव गांधी ग्रामीण भूमिहीन कृषि मजदूर न्याय योजना
schemes.benefit_en: Rs 7,000/year to landless agricultural laborer households
schemes.benefit_hi: भूमिहीन कृषि मजदूर परिवारों को ₹7,000/वर्ष
schemes.eligibility: CG rural landless agricultural laborers

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 5 lakh/year health insurance for HP residents not covered under PMJAY
schemes.benefit_hi: PMJAY से बाहर HP निवासियों को ₹5 लाख/वर्ष स्वास्थ्य बीमा
schemes.eligibility: HP residents not eligible for PMJAY, premium Rs 365-1000/year by category

schemes.benefit_en: 25-35% subsidy on business loans for HP youth entrepreneurs
schemes.benefit_hi: HP युवा उद्यमियों को व्यावसायिक ऋण पर 25-35% सब्सिडी
schemes.eligibility: HP residents aged 18-45 starting new enterprises

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 3,000/month for home-based care of serious illness patients
schemes.benefit_hi: गंभीर बीमारी के घरेलू देखभाल के लिए ₹3,000/माह
schemes.eligibility: HP patients with cancer, paralysis, muscular dystrophy etc.
